title: Add additional caching diagnostics to stage executor
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

The stage executor has an option to use an external registry as a cache. However, when a cache miss occurs, it can be difficult to understand why, even with the log level set to trace. This is because debug log messages are not produced for many important branches of the caching logic. Even worse, one of the messages indicates a cache hit even when a cache miss occurred.

By adding these debug statements (appropriately gated behind the log level), developers attempting to debug caching issues in buildah will have a better chance of understanding the caching decisions that buildah is making.

#### How to verify it

Run buildah with `--log-level trace` and `--cache-from` in a context that triggers a cache miss and observe the additional logging output.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

None

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

None
